tools.title: Government Forms Navigator
tools.description: Find Aadhaar, Passport, PAN, and Ration Card forms from verified official sources.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult the official department if the workflow is state-specific, portal-only, or recently changed.
tools.sample_preview: Department-led browser showing form number, use case, and official source link.
sample_highlights: Choose a department first, then narrow by topic and state when needed.
Shows what each form is used for before opening the official source.
Uses government-hosted source links only for downloads and filing paths.
tools.sample_example_input: I need the Aadhaar form for a child below 5 years, or the PAN form for a foreign company.
tools.sample_example_output: "Aadhaar Form 3 is used for resident children below 5 years. PAN Form 96 is used for foreign entities such as overseas companies and LLPs."

tools.title: Salary Not Paid Notice
tools.description: Demand pending salary with Labour Department-ready language (≈5 min).
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if arrears exceed ₹50,000 or termination is disputed.
tools.sample_preview: Opening paragraph referencing Shops & Establishments compliance.
sample_highlights: States exact months unpaid and statutory references.
Demands payment within 7 days before escalating to Labour Commissioner.
Mentions right to claim interest and penalties.
tools.sample_example_input: Employee Nisha has not received April & May 2025 salary totaling ₹1,20,000 despite reminders.
tools.sample_example_output: "This is to demand immediate release of my salary for April and May 2025 amounting to ₹1,20,000 within seven (7) days, failing which I shall approach the Labour Commissioner."

tools.title: Rent Default / Eviction Notice
tools.description: Remind tenants about arrears and handover timelines.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if the property is mortgaged or eviction may require police aid.
tools.sample_preview: Notice referencing Section 106 Transfer of Property Act.
sample_highlights: Specifies rent due, maintenance, and notice period.
Calls for peaceful possession if dues unpaid.
Warns that municipal dues will be recovered from deposit.
tools.sample_example_input: Tenant owes ₹45,000 for July-August rent in Bengaluru apartment.
tools.sample_example_output: "You are called upon to clear ₹45,000 within fifteen (15) days or hand over vacant possession of Flat 203, Green Meadows, failing which eviction proceedings will commence."

tools.title: Consumer Complaint Notice
tools.description: Escalate defective product or poor service disputes.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if the defect caused injury or losses above ₹2 lakh.
tools.sample_preview: Consumer Protection Act compliant notice format.
sample_highlights: Captures invoice, complaint numbers, and desired remedy.
Allows replacement, repair, or refund choice.
Sets 15 day cure period before District Commission filing.
tools.sample_example_input: Washing machine bought for ₹28,500 stopped working within 10 days.
tools.sample_example_output: "Kindly replace the unit or refund ₹28,500 with ₹3,000 compensation within fifteen (15) days failing which complaint shall be filed before the Consumer Commission."

tools.title: Cheque Bounce Notice
tools.description: Issue NI Act compliant notice within 30 days of dishonour.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if multiple cheques bounced or limitation deadline is near.
tools.sample_preview: Section 138 NI Act format with demand clause.
sample_highlights: Mentions cheque number, date, bank, and return memo reason.
Demands payment within statutory 15 days.
Warns of prosecution and civil recovery.
tools.sample_example_input: Cheque No. 123456 dated 10 Oct 2025 for ₹2,40,000 returned for insufficient funds.
tools.sample_example_output: "You are hereby called upon to make payment of ₹2,40,000 within fifteen (15) days of receipt of this notice, failing which complaint under Section 138 shall be filed without further reference."

tools.title: Residential Rent Agreement
tools.description: 11-month lease with deposit, utilities, and exit clauses.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if the property is jointly owned or involves corporate tenants.
tools.sample_preview: Lease summary with rent, deposit, and maintenance table.
sample_highlights: Captures rent schedule and deposit adjustments.
Includes maintenance responsibilities and notice clause.
Adds special clause section for pets or parking.
tools.sample_example_input: Flat 5B rented for ₹32,000/month with ₹1.5 lakh deposit.
tools.sample_example_output: "Monthly rent of ₹32,000 is payable before the 5th of every month; ₹1,50,000 security deposit shall be refunded within 15 days after adjusting damages."

tools.title: Freelance Services Agreement
tools.description: Document scope, milestones, and IP transfer for gigs.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if IP ownership or licensing is complex.
sample_highlights: Breaks down milestones with fees and due dates.
Clarifies IP transfer on full payment.
Contains confidentiality & termination clause.
tools.sample_example_output: "Milestone 2 (Brand Book delivery) is payable at ₹35,000 within 7 days of submission; intellectual property transfers upon receipt."

tools.title: Employment Offer Letter
tools.description: Issue formal offers with CTC breakup and joining terms.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if ESOPs, garden leave, or relocation clauses are involved.
tools.sample_preview: Offer letter page with compensation summary.
sample_highlights: CTC breakup table with allowances.
Probation and background verification text.
Includes acceptance block for signatures.
tools.sample_example_input: Senior Product Manager offer ₹36 LPA starting 2 Dec.
tools.sample_example_output: "Your annual CTC is ₹36,00,000 comprising fixed salary of ₹28,00,000 and performance bonus up to ₹8,00,000. Probation is 6 months from your DOJ 02 Dec 2025."

tools.title: Mutual NDA
tools.description: Share sensitive information securely with partners.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if foreign parties or export controls are involved.
sample_highlights: Defines confidential information.
Sets 3 year survival period.
Includes jurisdiction + injunctive relief clauses.
tools.sample_example_input: Cybersecurity pilot between TechLabs and VendorCo.
tools.sample_example_output: "Each party shall protect confidential information with at least the same degree of care it uses to protect its own confidential information and not less than reasonable care."

tools.title: Sale of Goods Agreement
tools.description: Record B2B supply deals with warranties and delivery terms.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if cross-border shipments or LC payments are involved.
tools.sample_preview: Table covering quantity, price, and delivery window.
sample_highlights: Captures SKU quantities and GST.
Specifies warranty and indemnity text.
Includes liquidated damages clause for late delivery.
tools.sample_example_output: "Buyer shall pay ₹16,00,000 within 10 days of dispatch; Seller warrants goods for 12 months against manufacturing defects."

tools.title: Notice Period Advisor
tools.description: Estimate statutory notice period using sector + tenure.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if employment is governed by certified standing orders.
tools.sample_preview: Scenario: 3.5 years in IT services recommends 40 days.
sample_highlights: Shows statutory min/cap with explanation.
Flags when company policy exceeds Shops & Establishments guidance.
Provides rationale text for HR emails.
tools.sample_example_output: "Recommended notice is 40 days (statutory base 30 + 5 days/year) capped at 90 days."

tools.title: Working Hours & Overtime
tools.description: Check Factories Act compliance and overtime pay.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if weekly hours regularly exceed 60 or shifts cross midnight.
tools.sample_preview: Scenario: 52 hour week at ₹350/hr triggers overtime.
sample_highlights: Shows compliant vs warning states.
Calculates overtime hours and estimated pay.
Mentions double rate assumption with citation.
tools.sample_example_output: "Overtime triggered for 4 hours. Estimated overtime pay: ₹2,800 at 2x."

tools.title: Maternity Benefit Estimator
tools.description: Check eligibility + benefit under the Maternity Benefit Act.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if employer has <10 employees or roles are contractual.
tools.sample_preview: Scenario: 240 days at ₹1,500/day qualifies for 26 weeks.
sample_highlights: Displays eligibility badge.
Shows payable weeks/days and estimated benefit.
Mentions supporting documents needed.

tools.title: Consumer Compensation Calculator
tools.description: Combine refund, delay damages, and expenses for notices.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if damages exceed ₹5 lakh or involve medical negligence.
sample_highlights: Breaks down refund vs damages.
Shows recommended demand letter value.
Explains assumptions per Consumer Protection Act.

tools.title: PF Claim Helper
tools.description: Upload a UAN slip, PF rejection email, or screenshot and get a step-by-step fix plan.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if the employer has disputed service records or is refusing statutory forms.
tools.sample_preview: Shows common PF rejection reasons and the exact documents to resubmit.
sample_highlights: Reads UAN screenshots, PF portal notices, and employer responses.
Gives a step-by-step resolution checklist.
Flags when to escalate to EPFO or a labour lawyer.
tools.sample_example_input: PF claim rejected because of name mismatch and missing exit date.
tools.sample_example_output: "Step 1: correct the name as per Aadhaar and submit the joint declaration. Step 2: attach exit date proof. Step 3: refile and track the EPFO complaint number."

prefill.value: I need help fixing my PF claim rejection. Please review my UAN screenshot or rejection note and give me a step-by-step resolution plan.

tools.title: Rental Agreement Checker
tools.description: Upload a lease draft and get a risk summary with missing clauses and red flags.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if the lease is long-term, high-value, or involves commercial premises.
tools.sample_preview: Highlights deposit, termination, maintenance, and registration risks.
sample_highlights: Summarises key lease clauses in plain English.
Flags one-sided deposit and termination terms.
Shows a clean list of fixes before signing.
tools.sample_example_input: 11-month apartment lease with no maintenance clause and no notice period.
tools.sample_example_output: "Risk summary: the agreement should add a maintenance split, a 30-day notice period, and a refund timeline for the security deposit."

prefill.value: Please review this rental agreement for missing clauses, unfair terms, and signing risks.

tools.title: Consumer Complaint Generator
tools.description: Turn invoice details into a ready-to-send complaint and escalation draft.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if the dispute involves injury, large losses, or repeated non-response.
tools.sample_preview: Builds a clean complaint letter from purchase, defect, and compensation details.
sample_highlights: Collects purchase value, defect date, and remedy choice.
Drafts a complaint letter for the seller or service provider.
Prepares escalation language for the consumer commission.
tools.sample_example_input: Broken washing machine, invoice ₹28,500, request refund and compensation.
tools.sample_example_output: "Draft ready: demand refund of ₹28,500, compensation of ₹3,000, and replacement or refund within 15 days before filing before the Consumer Commission."

prefill.value: Draft a consumer complaint based on this product defect and prepare the next escalation step.

tools.title: Legal Notice Simplifier
tools.description: Upload a notice and get a human-friendly explanation plus reply options.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if the notice mentions litigation, injunctions, or a short statutory deadline.
tools.sample_preview: Explains the notice in simple English and lists the response choices.
sample_highlights: Summarises the notice in one short paragraph.
Highlights deadlines, demands, and legal hooks.
Suggests the next reply or reply-draft workflow.
tools.sample_example_input: Section 138 cheque bounce notice demanding payment in 15 days.
tools.sample_example_output: "Simple English: the sender says your cheque bounced and wants payment within 15 days, otherwise they may start a case. Suggested next step: confirm facts, preserve documents, and prepare a reply."

prefill.value: Please simplify this legal notice in plain English and tell me what I should do next.

tools.title: AI Document Reviewer
tools.description: Upload legal notices, government letters, or agreements and get extracted text plus next steps.
tools.when_to_consult: Consult a lawyer if the document will be filed in court or signed by CXOs.
tools.sample_preview: Demonstrates how Saathi extracts text, explains it in simple English, and lists next actions.
sample_highlights: Uploads a legal notice, rental agreement, or government letter.
Shows the extracted text with a simple-English explanation.
Explains data retention and manual review options.
tools.sample_example_input: 5 page vendor agreement with indemnity and payment clause.
tools.sample_example_output: "AI Review Flags: (1) Payment milestone mismatch, (2) Overbroad indemnity, (3) Missing jurisdiction clause. Extracted text and next-step checklist provided."
